reviews.title: What you pay for. Cheap but functional
reviews.text: It's a hit or miss. I read the reviews before I bought it. And was scared off. But I ended up getting it. And it came in a decent box. Very nice sleek keyboard with no missing or loose keys like I've seen others have.  Rid not come with batteries. But only needs 1 AA and 2 AAA. So that wasn't too bad. Plugged it in and the keyboard and mouse works perfect for what it is. Nothing fancy. Just a wireless mouse and keyboard set.  I'm very satisfied with how much it was and what I received.  Thank you.

reviews.title: SMART TV Keyboard and Mouse Control
reviews.text: Makes you SMART when using FireStick or any other software on SMART TV!

reviews.title: Liked it until .....
reviews.text:
As I began typing, I liked the smooth, quite feel BUT quickly discovered that this keyboard does NOT have a 'Print Screen' key, which is vital when working. DO NOT Buy this if you need it for work. As you can see in the picture provided, the 'F11' key is NOT labeled.
F11 toggles from Full Screen back to regular screen. The first 4 keys at the top of the number key pad are TOTALLY UNNECESSARY.
1st key) Same function as Ctrl+C (Copy)
2nd key) Does Absolutely Nothing!
3rd key) Same function as Ctrl+V, (Paste)
4th key) Same function as Ctrl+X (Cut)
Had this keyboard followed the SAME FORMAT
The keyboard is overpriced to be missing a vital function as Print Screen Key.

reviews.title: Overall all good
reviews.text: Lots of fingerprints after using will stay.

reviews.title: Mouse
reviews.text: I really like the Logitech Wireless Mouse M305. It was simple to hook up and I like the size. I like the fact it has a turn off switch underneath so I can extend the battery life. I use it with my desktop.

reviews.title: My favorite mouse
reviews.text: My favorite mouse. I have several of these, with different themes. They are reliable and just the right size for my adult female hands. Most adult mice are at least a little clumsy and over-sized, while chidren's mice are too small. Also this model comes in awesome designs, although this model has been STUPIDLY discontinued.

reviews.text: Mouse works great. I prefer the M305 over the New one, because I feel "like I have more control with this model over the New faster replacement model.

reviews.title: Works well, light, easy.
reviews.text: This works really well, I do wish it had a little bit more weight to it.  I use the surface mouse generally and love it.  I bought this as a replacement bc I transitioned my surface mouse to my work computer. This works similarly well, it’s just so light it doesn’t feel as sturdy.  It won’t work with 2 devices at once, you have to keep switching, but does have multiple ways to connect.

reviews.title: Sharp, poor cursor control, poor scrolling
reviews.text: I had hoped, for this price, I might get something that worked...NOT!  The edges are sharp and very uncomfortable.  If you have tiny hands, this might work.  Scrolling is pretty much a bumpy ride, all or nothing, no matter how you set the scroll.  The cursor was very hard to control and very hard to get it in the right place.  Yes, I played with mouse settings and tried to tweak but no go.

reviews.title: Awesome Bluetooth function and great price!
reviews.text: After ordering two other “blue tooth” mice and having to return them both when they were dependent on a USB port, this one came through with flying colors and was cheaper than the first two I had to buy and return!!

reviews.title: Bought again
reviews.text: this mouse has everything i need it. i don’t need batteries, i can use by 2 device on a time , it can fold and the shape is very nice. good job 👍

reviews.title: Improvement over MS Arc mouse
reviews.text: Does not disconnect from laptop. Very responsive. On other hand it is rather poorly made, feels like it will fall apart at any minute.

reviews.title: Glitches
reviews.text: I got this mouse because I left my good mouse at a friend's house, who I won't see for a month. I guess you get what you pay for because I've been working for about 2 hours and I've had to take the battery out to reset 5 times. The mouse icon just stops moving. At first I thought it happened when I was typing and went to move it again and it went to sleep, because the light went off. But it just stops mid move on a screen. It's almost better to just use the laptop track pad. I would not recommend

reviews.title: Too small to be ergonomic for large hands
reviews.text: This will be a quick return. This mouse is too small and does not have enough vertical lift to be ergonomic for someone with large hands. I was pleased with how quickly it charged. But after fully charging there is no response at all from the DPI button. And the initial setting is too slow for the mouse to be of real use. If I had kids at home I would pass this along for schoolwork, but it isn't adequate for gaming or long stretches of editing.

reviews.title: Perfect for carpal tunnel
reviews.text: If you have carpal tunnel get this now. No pain at all anymore

reviews.title: Nice vertical mouse

reviews.title: Battery life isn't that great
reviews.text: I use this for work. 5 days a week for about 7 hours a day. I turn it off every night and turn it on every morning. I love everything about this mouse but the battery isn't that great. It died after about 2 weeks full charge

reviews.title: ASMR fantastic!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:5a9baeffb5013de01b566ac34f1da8a5]] Love the way this keyboard sounds as I type.  I also like that the round keys allow a little more room in between keys and that I don’t make as many errors while typing.  The color is great and the design is think and sleek.

reviews.title: my favorite keyboard
reviews.text: This keyboard is the best! It is comfortable to use, matches my desk setup perfectly, and best of all, the keys AND the mouse are basically totally silent! My 10-month-old is a VERY light sleeper! Everything wakes her up, but not these. A major win for me! Highly recommend. 100% I would buy this again! (batteries are not included. You need one aa battery for the keyboard and also the mouse)

reviews.title: Wired + Wireless?  Work for you? Good multimedia controls & phone slot
reviews.text:
Not a fan of wireless accessories (the batteries typically fail without warning, makers want you to be surprised), I made an exception for this pairing model because the keyboard is wired.

PRO
-Ubiquitous AA battery for mouse
-Economical
-Numeric pad
-Multimedia buttons: Volume knob, buttons for mute, pause, previous, next
-A place to put your phone (nice touch!)

CON
-Neither is backlit
-KB not programmable

NEUTRAL
-Non-'clack-y' key design, these are "quiet"
-Some humans will like pink, not widely available, maybe a good gift
-Con (for me) is the wireless mouse

reviews.title: Fun cordless mouse and keyboard
reviews.text: This is a great little retro cordless keyboard and mouse combo. I ordered it because it has just one dongle that both operate from. That gives me more USB ports available for other things. It works great as long as the keyboard and mouse are close to the laptop or the tower. It lags a bit when it’s in a keyboard drawer. I like the compact and portable nature this setup includes!

reviews.title: pink keyboard and wireless mouse
reviews.text: Love the pink color of this retro keyboard and mouse.  Great that the keyboard is spill proof I can have my coffee and not worry about wrecking my keyboard.  Easily plugged right into my all-in-one computer.  Took me a little while to get used to the punk keycaps, and now I love how quiet and comfortable they are to use.  The mouse fits well in my hand, and the wheel rolls back and forth smoothly. Top 5 stars for this one!

reviews.title: No instructions on box but, easy
reviews.text: Perfect and does the job. I had to google the instructions. But it’s super easy set up. The little usb part that needs to plug into your laptop to talk to the mouse, is plugged into the under side of the mouse, simply pull out and stick into the laptop, switch the button on the mouse (on bottom) to on, and as long as charged up, it’s ready to go. Battery life is banging. I’d recommend. It’s light and not super quality,but it’s doing the job and it’s light and comfy. Recommend.

reviews.title: Impressed!
reviews.text: This was everything I was looking for in a mouse; matte finish, silent clicks, mouse speed options, and easy connectivity! I like a flatter mouse as I find them easier to use for gaming or anything that needs a lot of movement, and the noiseless clicks make it that much easier to stay up for late-night sessions without annoying any roommates/others trying to sleep. Super easy set-up, my laptop recognized the mouse and connected to it as soon as I inserted the USB. All in all, very happy with this mouse!

reviews.title: Great looking and feeling mouse!
reviews.text: I LOVE THIS MOUSE! I got in real and I love the strip of light along the sides. I had to dock a star because the little usb that gets stored on the bottom won’t come out. The little notch isn’t deep enough for my nails or a card to go under. (See photo). Although, I’m still able to use it via Bluetooth and that works great. I have no idea what the DPI button on the top does since the instructions don’t say anything about it. Oh and I’ve been using it for about 2.5 weeks now and I haven’t had to recharge the battery. 👍🏼

【WIDE COMPATIBILITY】Ergonomic mouse wireless compatible with PC,Laptop,Computer,Desktop. System include Windows 8/9/10/XP,Windows Vista,Linux,with hardware connectivity by wireless USB Receiver. If you are using a Linux,need to set related software then mouse can be used normally.

【GREAT CUSTOMER SERVICE】[90 Day Money-back Guarantee],[365 Days Warranty (replacement service) ],[Lifetime Technical Support]. If our vertical mouse does not fit your hand well,welcome to contact us for help,you'll get free replacement/refund without hassle at any time.

reviews.title: Nice, but too large for my hands
reviews.text: This was a nice mouse. Scrolled smoothly. However the scroll wheel was too far to comfortably use with my hands. I had to keep reaching for the wheel and it was causing stress on my elbows. I ended up retuning it. I will look for a smaller mouse that will fit my hands better. If you have large hands this mouse will work well for you.

【AUTOMATIC POWER SAVING FUNCTION】The EDJO wireless keyboard and mouse combo has the function of automatically entering the power-saving state. When you stop using the keyboard more than 30 minutes, stop using the mouse more than 25 seconds, they will enter sleep mode respectively to save power. 【WIRELESS OPTICAL MOUSE】The mouse was optical design, even on some smooth surfaces, precise control can be obtained. 3-level adjustable DPI (800/1200/1600) allows you to choose your favorite moving speed of cursor. reviews.title: Usable keyboard. Mouse is a little problematic.
reviews.text: The keyboard is good and more ergonomic than others but lack of function keys makes less than desirable. The mouse just kept, intermittently disconnecting so was unusable.

reviews.title: Comfortable to use
reviews.text: I didn't have any expectations for this wireless keyboard and mouse set. I just wanted it to sync up easily to the PC and it did. More than that, it is a surprisingly comfortable keyboard to work with. The keys are responsive and accurate. I can put it at an angle that I like. It is easy to store away. I just really like it more than I had expected. I may not have had particular expectations. I just wanted to try out a keyboard/mouse set on a PC that wasn't getting much use, but I may end up putting this set with my main PC set up. I like it that much.

reviews.title: Plug n Play
reviews.text: This is a nice keyboard mouse combo. Set up was simple. There is one dongle for both the keyboard and the mouse. The keyboard is quiet, comfortable and a good size. The mouse is responsive. Time will tell how long it lasts but for now I am pleased with its performance.
